name: Murray & Roberts Holdings Limited
summary: Murray & Roberts Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates in the mining, energy, resources, infrastructure, power, industrial, and water markets. It offers services for energy, resources, and infrastructure platforms, such as engineering, construction, commission, operations, and maintenance, as well as engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) services for metals and minerals, and infrastructure markets in Australia, Scotland, South Korea, and the United States. The company also provides services for mining platforms, including feasibility studies, specialist engineering, vertical and decline shaft construction, mine development, and specialist mining services, such as raise boring and grouting, as well as contract mining for projects in Australia, Canada, Indonesia, Mongolia, South Africa, the United States, Mexico, Chile, and Zambia. In addition, it offers services to power, industrial, and water platforms consisting of feasibility studies, detailed engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, and repairs and maintenance work, as well as provides services to other markets, including petrochemicals, metals and minerals, and paper and pulp. Murray & Roberts Holdings Limited was founded in 1902 and is headquartered in Bedfordview, South Africa.
